name: DPAPI Domain Backup Key Extraction
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Roberto Rodriguez @Cyb3rWard0g
SIGMA Title: DPAPI Domain Backup Key Extraction
SIGMA Description: Detects tools extracting LSA secret DPAPI domain backup key from Domain Controllers

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4662 AND "Object Type"='SecretObject' AND "Access Mask"='0x2' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%bckupkey%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DPAPI Domain Backup Key Extraction on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4662 AND "Object Type"='SecretObject' AND "Access Mask"='0x2' AND LOWER("Object Name") LIKE '%bckupkey%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DPAPI Domain Backup Key Extraction
